name: Nipmod Base MCP integration outline
summary: Use Nipmod as a read-only package and tool preflight before a Base-focused agent installs or enables external tooling and continues to Base MCP, x402 or protocol-specific work.

roles.baseMcp: User-approved onchain action surface through Base Account and ecosystem skill plugins.
roles.nipmod: Read-only package intelligence preflight before external SDKs, CLIs, MCP servers, repos, packages or API clients are installed or enabled.
roles.agentHost: Local policy and approval boundary for workspace writes, tool enablement and paid request setup.
roles.user: Approves local workspace changes and Base Account actions.

calls.remoteMcpResolve: POST https://nipmod.com/api/mcp tools/call nipmod.resolve with x-nipmod-api-key
calls.remoteMcpInstallPlan: POST https://nipmod.com/api/mcp tools/call nipmod.external_install_plan with x-nipmod-api-key

baseBuilderCode.currentUse: Reserved for future onchain or x402 attribution. The hosted package intelligence API does not append transaction data.
